display.purpose: The cycling hero role word. Largest, most authored type on the page.

headline.purpose: Section titles and the contact closing line.

body.purpose: Descriptions, the contact lead, the hero statement line. Capped near 75 characters.

label.purpose: Monospace uppercase kickers, lane labels, project metadata, badges.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Default lift for cards and composed surfaces (the --shadow-tight token).

shadows.name: ambient-plate
shadows.purpose: Deeper, softer shadow under the hero media plate and project card shells.

shadows.name: inset-highlight
shadows.purpose: Faint warm top edge on raised surfaces (nav, hero plate, cards).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and ambient drift.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Decelerating curve for beams, scan lines, and reveals.

motion.name: duration-med
motion.purpose: Card lifts, border-color shifts, scan sweeps.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Reveal entrances and slow ambient motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-emphasis action (the contact email link). Warm paper fill, dark ink text, pill shape, soft ambient shadow, an orbiting arrow.
components.html: zach@fluxninelabs.com
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.45rem; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 620; text-decoration: none; min-height: 3.1rem; padding: 0.34rem 0.38rem 0.34rem 1rem; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 91%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 72%, transparent); color: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 91%, oklch(76% 0.083 83) 9%); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 70%, transparent); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn-orbit { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.92rem; height: 1.92rem; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(5.1% 0.009 238) 8%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(5.1% 0.009 238) 8%, transparent); transition: transform 520ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-orbit { transform: translate3d(0.12rem,-0.08rem,0) scale(1.035); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The navigation's resting action style. Transparent, faint-paper text, pill shape; hover raises a faint fill and shifts text to full paper.
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 520; min-height: 2.875rem; padding-inline: 0.82rem; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 68%, transparent); cursor: pointer; transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 4.5%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 7%, transparent); color: oklch(94.6% 0.018 83); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 70%, transparent); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Label Badge
components.description: The working badge: a transparent, borderless monospace label for index numbers, lane names, status, year, and tags.
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .ds-badge-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'SF Mono', SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 610; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(66% 0.017 83); background: transparent; border: 0; padding: 0; }

components.name: Hero CTA
components.description: The single quiet primary action in the hero: a text link with a sliding right arrow. Internal navigation, so it uses arrow-right, never the external arrow-up-right.
components.html: Start a conversation
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .ds-hero-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.34rem; min-height: 2.75rem; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 580; text-decoration: none; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 72%, transparent); transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-hero-cta svg { transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.18,0.92,0.18,1); } .ds-hero-cta:hover { color: oklch(94.6% 0.018 83); } .ds-hero-cta:hover svg { transform: translateX(0.18rem); } .ds-hero-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 70%, transparent); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Studio Lane
components.description: One bordered cell of the studio index ledger. A link into its matching project; hover lifts the cell, draws a top gleam, and extends a project-tone meter.
components.html:
Code

Compact AI systems, automations, and interfaces that ship.
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; } .ds-lane { --tone: oklch(76.5% 0.078 206); position: relative; display: block; max-width: 18rem; min-height: 7.75rem; padding: 1.4rem; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; border: 0; border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 5%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 5%, transparent); transition: color 520ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-lane-gleam { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(-60%,0,0); background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, color-mix(in oklch, var(--tone) 32%, transparent), transparent); transition: opacity 520ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), transform 1080ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-lane:hover .ds-lane-gleam { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(60%,0,0); } .ds-lane-label { display: inline-block; font-family: 'SF Mono', SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 720; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 82%, var(--tone) 18%); } .ds-lane-detail { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.94rem; line-height: 1.52; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 72%, transparent); } .ds-lane-meter { display: block; margin-top: 1rem; width: 7rem; height: 1px; opacity: 0.2; transform: scaleX(0.36); transform-origin: left; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--tone), transparent); transition: opacity 520ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), transform 1080ms cubic-bezier(0.18,0.92,0.18,1); } .ds-lane:hover .ds-lane-meter { opacity: 0.72; transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-lane:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 70%, transparent); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: The signature surface: a framed shell wrapping a 16:9 media plate, monospace metadata, an editorial title, description, and tags. Hover lifts the card and brightens the project-tone hairline.
components.html:
02LISTEN

WaveReact

A live music platform for upcoming releases, artist follows, and recommendation loops.

Open Platform
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; } .ds-card { --tone: oklch(76% 0.083 83); display: block; max-width: 24rem; padding: 0.45rem; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 2rem; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(7.4% 0.011 238) 92%, var(--tone) 8%); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 4.8%, var(--tone) 5.2%); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(5.1% 0.009 238) 18%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 4.5%, transparent); transition: border-color 520ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), transform 520ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 12%, var(--tone) 40%); } .ds-card-media { aspect-ratio: 16/9; border-radius: 1.17rem; background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 20%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--tone) 14%, transparent), transparent 60%), oklch(9.4% 0.012 238); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 7%, transparent); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.35rem 1.1rem 1.1rem; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; gap: 0.6rem; } .ds-card-tag { font-family: 'SF Mono', SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(66% 0.017 83); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0.6rem 0 0; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 680; line-height: 1.05; color: oklch(94.6% 0.018 83); } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0.6rem 0 0; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.62; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 72%, transparent); } .ds-card-foot { margin-top: 1.1rem; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 660; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 72%, transparent); transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-foot { color: oklch(94.6% 0.018 83); transform: translateX(0.15rem); } .ds-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 70%, transparent); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Floating Nav
components.description: A pill-shaped sticky bar with a backdrop blur, a brand seal on the left and ghost-button anchors on the right.
components.html:
zach skov
WorkContact
components.css: .ds-stage { background: oklch(5.1% 0.009 238); padding: 2.5rem; } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 2rem; min-height: 4.15rem; padding: 0.52rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(5.1% 0.009 238) 74%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 8.5%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 22px 70px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(5.1% 0.009 238) 28%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 7.5%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(1.18); } .ds-nav-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-seal { width: 2.7rem; height: 2.7rem; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(9.4% 0.012 238) 82%, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 18%); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 8%, oklch(73% 0.054 162) 12%); } .ds-nav-name { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.96rem; font-weight: 640; color: oklch(94.6% 0.018 83); } .ds-nav-actions { display: flex; gap: 0.7rem; } .ds-nav-actions a { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 520; text-decoration: none; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(94.6% 0.018 83) 68%, transparent); padding: 0.6rem 0.6rem; transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-nav-actions a:hover { color: oklch(94.6% 0.018 83); }

narrative.overview: The interface behaves like a late-night room where raw signal is developed into composed work. Surfaces are near-black, precise lines divide space, and a single cinematic instrument (the hero media plate) glows at the center. It is a workspace, not a showcase: the visitor reads it the way they would read a quiet archive, calmly and in order. The page is organized as four movements (hero, studio index, selected work, contact); structure is left-aligned and editorial with asymmetric balance, and the hero is the single centered, visual-first movement. Motion is slow and singular: one confident load moment, restrained ambient drift, and hover detail that resolves rather than competes.
keyCharacteristics: Tinted near-black surfaces; depth from tonal layering plus soft ambient shadow.
One restrained color strategy: three accents, each owning a single domain.
Editorial grotesk display type; a monospace voice reserved for technical labels.
Quiet at rest, alive on interaction: components hold still until hovered, then respond with slow, precise motion.
Reduced-motion is a first-class path, not an afterthought.

rules.name: The Three-Lane Rule
rules.body: Sage, brass, and signal cyan each own one domain (system / editorial / analytical). They are never swapped or blended decoratively. A project's tone and its studio lane's tone always agree.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is tinted toward ink hue 238 or paper hue 83; every highlight and shadow is a color-mix against foreground or scrim, never a raw white or black.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: The monospace voice is reserved for small uppercase labels, kickers, project metadata, and technical detail lines. It never sets body copy and never sets a heading.

rules.name: The Tight-Display Rule
rules.body: Large display type carries negative tracking (-0.02em on the hero word, -0.015em on headlines); small uppercase labels carry positive tracking (+0.06em). Tracking is always deliberate, never left at a no-op default.

rules.name: The Soft-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are always large-radius, low-opacity, and near-black-tinted. Hard, dark, or tight drop shadows are forbidden. When in doubt, add a tonal surface step instead of a shadow.

dos: Do author every neutral, highlight, and shadow as an OKLCH value or a color-mix against foreground / scrim.
Do keep the three accents in their lanes: sage for system intelligence and archive, brass for video / music / editorial warmth, signal cyan for data and analytical detail.
Do reserve the monospace voice for small uppercase labels and metadata; set everything else in Bricolage Grotesque.
Do build depth from tonal surface steps first, soft ambient shadow second.
Do keep motion slow and singular: one confident hero load moment, hover detail that resolves.
Do give every interactive element a 44px target, a visible focus ring, and a reduced-motion path.
Do keep body measure under 75 characters and large display type on tight negative tracking.
donts: Don't introduce cyberpunk clutter, neon dashboards, or fake terminal theatrics.
Don't add default SaaS proof strips, hero-metric templates, or generic icon-card grids.
Don't use glassmorphism for decoration; the one nav backdrop blur is the only sanctioned blur.
Don't reach for purple-blue AI gradients, rainbow gradients, or background-clip: text gradient text.
Don't let the page read like a template with project links swapped in.
Don't use #000, #fff, hard drop shadows, or border-left / border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't use em dashes in copy; use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't stack competing ambient animations in the hero; one drift layer is the ceiling.
